calendar.matters:
Motion To Strike And Tax Defts' Memorandum Of Costs And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-06-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Motion to Strike/Tax Defendant's Memorandum of Costs; Request for Sanctions. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. APPEARANCES: Aaron McClellan, Esq., for plaintiff; Shoba Dandillaya, Attorney at Law, for defendant. The court hears oral argument. Plaintiff's motion is granted. Defendants' costs are stricken in their entirety. Order signed and filed this date. The court further directs that the judgment herein, as to plaintiff Nona Nangalama, be amended by the addition of the allowed costs.

To Strike Or In The Alternative To Tax Plaintiff'S Memorandum Of Cost. Notice Of Motion To Strike Or Tax Memorandum Of Costs
Off Calendar Aug-06-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Defendants' Motion to Strike/Tax Plaintiff's Memorandum of Costs. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. APPEARANCES: Aaron McClellan, Esq., for plaintiff; Shoba Dandillaya, Attorney at Law, for defendant. The court hears oral argument. The motion is granted in part and denied in part. The request for sanctions is denied. Order signed and filed this date.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Plaintiff: Nona Nangalama the Guardian ad Litem present with counsel, Aaron Mcclellan.
Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
The Court hears evidence and grants compromise as follows:
Attorney's fees $369.00
Costs $23.00
One check or draft in the total amount of $1,107.00 drawn payable to the order of petitioner as trustee for claimant, to be distributed to claimant upon reaching the age of 18. The settlement funds to be deposited into Golden State Scholarshare account #1817-1007111.
Order signed in open court.
